meta.title: AI Adoption Readiness Questionnaire
meta.description: Intake form for the AI Adoption DSS. Answers populate Q-tagged fields in the company profile schema.

questions.text: What is your company's legal name?
In which country is your company registered?
In which city is your company based?
How many full-time employees does your company have?
What best describes your industry?
Which best describes your business model?
What is your approximate annual revenue in EUR?

sections.title: Operational Processes
sections.description: Help us understand how your business operates day-to-day.

questions.text: What is the primary operational process that drives your business? (the one your team spends the most time on)
questions.placeholder: e.g. Managing incoming customer orders, packaging, and coordinating shipments with our courier partner.

questions.text: What is your biggest operational bottleneck right now? (the thing that slows you down most or wastes the most time)
questions.placeholder: e.g. We spend 2 hours every day answering the same WhatsApp and Instagram questions about sizing, availability, and shipping times.

questions.text: Which of the following operational areas are active in your business? (select all that apply)

sections.title: Current Technology Stack
sections.description: Which tools and platforms does your company currently use?

questions.text: Which of the following tools does your company currently use? (select all that apply)
Are there any other important tools you use that are not listed above?
Do you have a CRM system where you track customer relationships?

sections.title: Data & Exports
sections.description: Understanding what data you have helps us determine which AI tools can work for you.

questions.text: Can you export your business data (orders, customers, products) in a structured format such as CSV or Excel?
Which types of data can you export? (select all that apply)
How many months of historical data do you have available?
Approximately how many transactions (orders, sales, interactions) does your business handle per month?

sections.title: Technical Capability
sections.description: This helps us understand what level of technical setup you can handle.

questions.text: How would you describe your team's technical capability?
options: Low — we use off-the-shelf tools, no technical setup possible
Medium — we can configure integrations (e.g. Zapier, API keys) but no custom development
High — we have developer access and can build or modify code

questions.text: Does your company have access to a developer (in-house or external)?

sections.title: Implementation Support
sections.description: Would you like help setting up the recommended tools?

questions.text: If a recommended tool requires technical setup, would you be open to getting implementation support?
options: No — I will implement tools on my own
Yes — I am open to getting implementation help

sections.title: CRM & Sales (if applicable)
sections.description: Complete this section if CRM & Sales is one of your active domains.

questions.text: How many active leads or customers do you manage at any given time?
Do you struggle with following up on leads in a timely manner?
Do you find it difficult to get a clear picture of your sales pipeline at any moment?

sections.title: E-commerce & Orders (if applicable)
sections.description: Complete this section if E-commerce is one of your active domains.

questions.text: Which e-commerce platform do you primarily use?
Are returns and refunds a significant manual workload for your team?
Do you have difficulty tracking stock levels and avoiding stockouts?

sections.title: Customer Support (if applicable)
sections.description: Complete this section if Customer Support is one of your active domains.

questions.text: Do you spend significant time answering the same customer questions repeatedly (e.g. via DM, email, or chat)?
Do customers complain about slow response times, or do you struggle to respond quickly?
Is your support team overwhelmed by the volume of incoming inquiries?

sections.title: Marketing (if applicable)
sections.description: Complete this section if Marketing is one of your active domains.

questions.text: Does content creation (social posts, emails, product descriptions) take significant time each week?
Are you unsatisfied with the return on your marketing efforts (low open rates, low conversion, poor ad performance)?

sections.title: Operations & Back-office (if applicable)
sections.description: Complete this section if Operations & Back-office is one of your active domains.

questions.text: Does your team spend significant time on manual data entry or copying information between tools?
Is invoice processing, proposal writing, or document creation a significant time drain?
Do you find it difficult to get a clear, actionable picture of your business performance from your data?

sections.title: Supply Chain & Inventory (if applicable)
sections.description: Complete this section if Supply Chain & Inventory is one of your active domains.

questions.text: Do you regularly run out of stock on popular items?
Do you have problems with overstocking slow-moving items?
Is managing supplier communication, orders, or purchase tracking a significant bottleneck?

sections.title: Anything else?
sections.description: Any additional context that might help us understand your situation.

questions.text: Is there anything else important about your business situation, goals, or constraints that we should know?
questions.placeholder: e.g. We are planning to expand to two new markets next year. We work primarily with seasonal products so Q4 is critical.

questions.text: Have you tried any AI tools before? If yes, what was your experience?
questions.placeholder: e.g. We tried Chatbase for a chatbot but stopped using it after two weeks.
